name: Biome Spread Control
author: Inidar
description: Toggle evil biome spread (corruption, crimson, hallow) on or off. Crystal shards and chlorophyte are unaffected.

disableSpread.label: Disable Evil Spread
disableSpread.description: When enabled, prevents corruption, crimson, and hallow from spreading to new tiles. Crystal shards and chlorophyte are unaffected.
